headline: Tech rotation out, healthcare in
detail: Investors are actively selling tech and buying healthcare as a safe haven. Your book is 90% tech/chips, so this rotation is a direct headwind across nearly every position you hold. Until this reversal shows exhaustion, rallies in your names may be sold.

headline: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on Digital Services Taxes
detail: This targets countries taxing U.S. tech companies and could escalate into a broader trade fight involving big tech platforms and chip supply chains. Elevated trade uncertainty keeps a ceiling on tech multiples, which directly pressures names like AVGO, PLTR, and CRWD in your book.

headline: ON Semi tanks 24% on Synaptics deal
detail: A major chip company dropping 24% in a single session is a sector sentiment shock. Even though you don't hold ON Semi, violent moves like this remind the market that chip valuations are fragile right now — bad timing given your AVGO concentration.

headline: Iran ceasefire violation, oil uncertainty
detail: Trump confirming Iran violated the ceasefire adds geopolitical noise and keeps energy/risk sentiment choppy. Indirectly, macro uncertainty tends to accelerate the flight from high-beta tech names like the ones dominating your portfolio.
